name: Xinjiang Xintai Natural Gas Co., Ltd.
summary: Xinjiang Xintai Natural Gas Co., Ltd. engages in the transmission, distribution, and sale of natural gas in China. It serves civil, commercial, automotive, and industrial parks. The company was formerly known as Xinjiang Xintai Investment (Group) Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Xinjiang Xintai Natural Gas Co., Ltd. in December 2012. Xinjiang Xintai Natural Gas Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Urumqi, China.
